name: VibeCoder MCP — AI Coding Workflow Orchestrator
what_it_does: VibeCoder MCP server providing an opinionated AI coding workflow orchestrator — managing context across long coding sessions, coordinating file edits, tracking task state, running tests, and implementing structured coding workflows that help AI agents write code more effectively and systematically for complex software projects.
use_cases: Managing complex multi-file coding projects from AI coding agents
Maintaining task context across extended coding sessions
Coordinating sequential code edits with verification from systematic agents
Running and validating tests as part of coding workflows from TDD agents
Structured code generation with rollback support from careful coding agents
Building production-quality software with AI assistance in an organized workflow
not_for: Simple code generation tasks (overhead not worth it for small edits)
Quick one-off scripts (use direct interpreter MCPs)
best_when: An AI agent needs structured, systematic coding workflow management for complex software projects — where context continuity, test verification, and organized task tracking matter.
avoid_when: You need simple code edits — use your IDE's built-in AI features or simpler code generation MCPs.

auth.notes: No external authentication — local filesystem and process management only.

known_agent_gotchas: Opinionated workflow — may not fit all coding styles or project structures
Community MCP from individual contributor — active development may vary
Workflow state management can be complex for non-standard project layouts
Test integration requires project-specific test runner configuration
May conflict with IDE-integrated AI features if both active simultaneously
Large codebases may require tuning for effective context management
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local filesystem access. No external auth. Community MCP. Code modifications should be reviewed. No credentials needed.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local filesystem only. No credentials. Community MCP. Review code changes.
